fields.name: AppState
fields.comment: ptr → main game state singleton (Ghidra: DAT_00DF0730)

fields.name: GameManager
fields.comment: ptr → GM (0x4528 bytes). Same object as GSI+0x28 chain.

fields.name: ServerId
fields.comment: u32 server ID (written by LoginManager from ws_config.xml)

fields.name: NpcTracking
fields.comment: ptr → container (appears after first quest accept)

fields.name: CurrencyBST
fields.comment: ptr* currency amounts BST header (real_GM+0x23C, shifted: -0x1C = 0x220)

fields.name: QuestDialogId
fields.comment: u32 quest ID of current dialog (0 if none)

fields.name: QuestDialogVectors
fields.comment: vector of UI elements for dialog

fields.name: QuestListPtr
fields.comment: ptr → array of quest entry pointers

fields.name: LootManager
fields.comment: obj LootManager (Ghidra: handler uses real_GM+0x4e4, shifted: -0x1C = 0x4C8)

fields.name: ZoneId
fields.comment: u32 game zone ID (not same as map file zone!)

fields.name: LoginToken
fields.comment: u16 auth token (2 bytes, set by Handler_LoginResult on success)

fields.name: SessionActive
fields.comment: u32 1=session active (set by Handler_CharacterList after char list received)

fields.name: CollisionGrid
fields.comment: ptr → collision grid struct (GDB confirmed, Ghidra FUN_008C1C60)

fields.name: QuestEntryEnd
fields.comment: ptr quest entry array end (Ghidra: FUN_0031FDC0)

fields.name: QuestEntryCount2
fields.comment: u32 quest entry count (internal, may differ from +0x3A0)

fields.name: IsConnected
fields.comment: u32 non-zero if network connection active

fields.name: PosState
fields.comment: u32 changes with movement (not a direct coord)

fields.name: TeamColor
fields.comment: u8 team color byte (0xFF=unset). Ghidra: FUN_008C2F30

fields.name: EntityKey
fields.comment: u32 entity key (same as TreeNode::Key). Ghidra: FUN_008C1210

fields.name: MoveSpeed
fields.comment: u32 velocity magnitude. Ghidra: BaseActor ctor

fields.name: VelocityX
fields.comment: s32 delta X per movement tick. Ghidra: MovementTick

fields.name: VelocityY
fields.comment: s32 delta Y per movement tick. Ghidra: MovementTick

fields.name: CombatPriority
fields.comment: u32 combat animation priority (higher = more important)

fields.name: TargetPtr
fields.comment: ptr pointer to targeted entity (0=none). Ghidra: entity builder

fields.name: TargetKey
fields.comment: u32 target entity key (set by SetTargetByKey)

fields.name: Buff1Base
fields.comment: ptr base pointer to buff entries

fields.name: Level
fields.comment: u8 entity level. Ghidra: FUN_008C3030 stores char (1 byte)

fields.name: DataTablePtr
fields.comment: ptr pointer to DataTable entry (NPC/mob). NULL for players. Ghidra: FUN_008C31D0

fields.name: CombatFlag
fields.comment: u32 combat-related flag (1 when NPC is in combat). NOT quest indicator!

fields.name: HostilityFlag
fields.comment: u8 client-side hostility marker. In 5v5 arena: 0xE0=ally, 0x20=enemy.

fields.name: IsBuilding
fields.comment: u32 is building flag. Ghidra: FUN_008C2240

fields.name: OwnerKey
fields.comment: u32 entity key of owner (pets/summons). 0 = hostile mob.

fields.name: DialogState
fields.comment: s16 dialog active (!=0 blocks input). Ghidra: HandleInput

fields.name: WeaponFlag
fields.comment: u16 forces melee if !=0. Ghidra: UpdateAttackAnim

fields.name: HPRegen
fields.comment: u32 HP regen rate (e.g. 19 = 19 un/5s). Isolated, validated

fields.name: EquipWeapon
fields.comment: ptr main weapon = slot 2 (validated with equip/unequip)

fields.name: EquipWeapon2
fields.comment: ptr second weapon ref (same ptr as +0x3DC)

fields.name: ClassId
fields.comment: u8 player class (1-20). Ghidra: FUN_008D8D10. 0 for NPCs.

fields.name: SkinId
fields.comment: s16 appearance skin model. Ghidra: FUN_008D8D60

fields.name: GMPtr
fields.comment: ptr back-reference to GameManager. Ghidra: SelectTarget

fields.name: XP
fields.comment: u32 current experience points. GDB validated 2026-03-30

fields.name: EquipSetId
fields.comment: u32 equipment set ID (triggers rebuild). Ghidra: FUN_008C8FA0

fields.name: Zoom
fields.comment: float computed zoom (settings_scale * screen_ratio). READ ONLY per frame

fields.name: ZoomFixed1
fields.comment: u32 zoom in 16.16 fixed point (65536 = 1.0), unrelated to game scale

fields.name: CamX
fields.comment: float camera X position (world pixel coords)

fields.name: VpLeft
fields.comment: int16 viewport left bound (scroll position, not fixed)

fields.name: VTable
fields.comment: ptr RVA 0xDC8230 (fixed for all interactive objects)

fields.name: D904_MIN_LEN
fields.comment: minimum bytes needed from d904 start

fields.name: CountersTree
fields.comment: ptr → tree {root, count, flags} of ObjectiveNode

fields.name: AreasTree
fields.comment: ptr → tree of AreaMarker vectors (one per zone)

fields.name: MarkerTree
fields.comment: ptr* BST quest_id → vector of 10B marker entries

fields.name: DialogQuestId
fields.comment: u32 currently-displayed quest ID (0 when closed)

fields.name: DialogRewardAcked
fields.comment: u8 0=first click shows reward preview, 1=next click confirms

fields.name: DialogActiveFlag
fields.comment: u8 1=popup visible, 0=closed/no-op. Confirm function early-returns on 0.

fields.name: DialogResultState
fields.comment: u32 written to 2 after confirm finishes

fields.name: FloatingTextCache
fields.comment: ptr* BST entity_key → floating combat text (NOT quest data)

fields.name: QuestDataTree
fields.comment: ptr* BST quest_id → quest_data_obj* (509 entries, all quests)

fields.name: ZoneQuestTree
fields.comment: ptr* BST zone_id → u32[] quest_ids per zone (68 zones)

fields.name: QuestStatusTree
fields.comment: ptr* BST seq_key → {quest_id, status} for all known quests

fields.name: OP_S2C_LOOT_ITEM_INFO
fields.comment: server sends item data for loot window

fields.name: OP_S2C_PICKUP_CONFIRM
fields.comment: item added to inventory after pickup

fields.name: FriendlyNPC
fields.comment: Container of friendly NPCs, NOT attackable (type 1)

fields.name: Corpse
fields.comment: Dead mob corpse (in corpseTree, has loot)

fields.name: MapZone
fields.comment: s16 map zone (differs from GM+0x1038 game zone!)

fields.name: ChatDispatch
fields.comment: FUN_003928a0(ChatMgr, ChannelObj) — dispatch to UI channels

fields.name: ChatBuildSend
fields.comment: FUN_003964b0(ChatMgr, packet, channel) — receive handler + send for area/party/world

fields.name: ChatGetText
fields.comment: FUN_0039c810(out_wstr, msg_obj) — extract full text from message blocks

fields.name: ChatSendArea
fields.comment: FUN_0048f630(MenuChat, text) — send area chat (via UI widget)

fields.name: ViewCtrlAdvance
fields.comment: FUN_004A5390(viewCtrl) — AVANÇAR/NEXT button handler (cleanup callbacks + ViewCtrlReset)

fields.name: LoginWithCredentials
fields.comment: FUN_004CE830(widget, email, password) — hash creds, store, connect(7), SceneTransition(5). FULL LOGIN.

fields.name: ViewTransition
fields.comment: FUN_004FB500(viewCtrl, sceneId, callback, ctx) — write sceneId to +0x3234

fields.name: ViewCtrlReset
fields.comment: FUN_004FC690(viewCtrl) — close popup + reset scene state

fields.name: SelectCharConnect
fields.comment: FUN_005DCA50(viewCtrl) — read charData from viewCtrl+0x497C/0x4980, set server_id+char_id, connect(2), SceneTransition(4)

fields.name: ItemsMgrUseItem
fields.comment: FUN_00872790(itemsMgr, item_id, slot_index) — full use-item flow

fields.name: FindSlotByType
fields.comment: FUN_00873ff0(itemsMgr, type, subtype) — find slot by item type

fields.name: LootPanelOpen
fields.comment: FUN_008767E0(itemsMgr, flag) — open loot confirmation panel

fields.name: AttackPacketBuild
fields.comment: build+send attack packet (type=1 attack, type=2 walk_to_loot)

fields.name: CorpseInteractBuild
fields.comment: build+send corpse/object interact packet (type>=4, hardcoded type=3)

fields.name: BuildMoveItemPkt
fields.comment: FUN_00897190(packetQueue, item_id, from_slot, to_slot) — move item between slots (Svp opcode 0x0d)

fields.name: BuildDeleteItemPkt
fields.comment: FUN_00897320(packetQueue, slot_idx, item_id) — delete/discard item (Svp opcode 0x0e)

fields.name: ObjectInteractBuild
fields.comment: FUN_00897c30: case 0x2716 loot/object packet (action=0x2E, objectKey u16)

fields.name: LootPickupSlot
fields.comment: FUN_00897D10(packetMgr, slotIdx, count) — pickup item from loot slot

fields.name: QuestPacketSimple
fields.comment: FUN_00897D70(packetMgr, u16 cmd) — simple quest/dialog packet

fields.name: PakFileRead
fields.comment: FUN_00ADE520(pakMgr, filename, outBuf) → char (0=fail). Hook to skip visual assets.

fields.name: SkillId
fields.comment: u32 skill ID (confirmed: matches tree key)

fields.name: NameStringId
fields.comment: u32 string table ID for name

fields.name: DescStringId
fields.comment: u32 string table ID for description

fields.name: EffectParams1
fields.comment: ptr → f32[] primary effect values (damage/heal per level)

fields.name: EffectParams1Sz
fields.comment: u32 byte count of effect_params1 array

fields.name: CooldownArray
fields.comment: ptr → u16[] cooldowns per level (in seconds)

fields.name: RangeArray
fields.comment: ptr → u16[] ranges per level (0 = self/melee)

fields.name: RemainingCdMs
fields.comment: u32 remaining cooldown (ms, 0=ready, decrements per frame)

fields.name: BaseCdMs
fields.comment: u32 base cooldown duration (ms, static from DataTable)

fields.name: OverrideFlag
fields.comment: u8 if set, use override cooldown

fields.name: RangeOverrideF
fields.comment: u8 if set, use override range

fields.name: ItemType
fields.comment: u8 item type (0xC=HP potion, 0xD=MP potion, etc.)

fields.name: WeaponSpeedRaw
fields.comment: u32 weapon attack speed (raw units, /578 ≈ seconds)

fields.name: ExitTableMain
fields.comment: arr primary exit table (8B entries: ptr+callback)
